INSIGHT.ComposeTargetHint: Select which user receives this notification. Other GMs are included so you can whisper to a co-GM or GM assistant.
INSIGHT.ComposeMessageHint: Sent privately to the chosen player. Supports bold and italic. Ctrl+Enter to send.
INSIGHT.ComposeMessagePlaceholder: The hairs on your neck rise...
INSIGHT.ComposeValidation: Please choose a recipient and type a message.
INSIGHT.SettingSoundFileHint: Optional audio file to play instead of the default procedural sound. Leave blank to use the built-in sound.
